## LibraryRuntime.MoldedBonBon class

A resolved view of a molded bonbon confection with navigation capabilities. Immutable - does not allow modification of underlying data.

**Signature:**

```typescript
export declare class MoldedBonBon extends ConfectionBase implements IMoldedBonBon 
```
**Extends:** [ConfectionBase](./ts-chocolate.libraryruntime.confectionbase.md)

**Implements:** [IMoldedBonBon](./ts-chocolate.libraryruntime.imoldedbonbon.md)

## Remarks

The constructor for this class is marked as internal. Third-party code should not call the constructor directly or create subclasses that extend the `MoldedBonBon` class.
